reason: Remove applyMigrations import — it's the wrong fix from a prior task; enabling PRAGMA foreign_keys replaces it
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
index c4d3389f5..eac2867ab 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
@@ -53,6 +53,9 @@ export const Client = Object.assign(
 
     const db = init(dbPath)
 
+    // Apply pending PG migrations on startup (fire-and-forget for PGlite speed)
+    applyMigrations(db).catch((err) => log.error("migration failed", { error: String(err) }))
+
     client = db
     loaded = true
     return db

reason: Fix H03: enable SQLite foreign key enforcement at startup instead of calling applyMigrations which was the wrong fix
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
index c4d3389f5..c97a4a75d 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
@@ -52,6 +52,7 @@ export const Client = Object.assign(
     log.info("opening database", { path: dbPath })
 
     const db = init(dbPath)
+    db.run("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON")
 
     client = db
     loaded = true

reason: Remove applyMigrations import — incorrect fix from prior task
Replace incorrect applyMigrations with PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON
